description_long: This clock tower features a tall, narrow structure with ornate carvings and a rich, brown wood-like finish. The front displays a large, round clock face with red hands and Arabic numerals, set within a decorative frame. The lower section of the tower is open, revealing an empty compartment, while the base is robust and intricately detailed. The rear side includes a black panel with white inscriptions and a plaque, suggesting commemorative or informational content. The sides are relatively plain, with subtle wood grain textures and some visible wear. The roof is gently curved and sculpted, adding a touch of elegance to the overall design.
description: A tall, ornately carved brown clock tower with a prominent round clock face and an open lower compartment, featuring decorative details and a sculpted roof.
description_view_0: The front view shows the ornate clock face with red hands and Arabic numerals, an open lower compartment, and detailed carvings on the base and roof.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the tower's narrow profile, subtle wood grain texture, and the sculpted roof's curvature.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a black panel with white inscriptions and a plaque, as well as the detailed base and back of the roof.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the plain wood texture, some visible wear, and the side of the clock face's decorative frame.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is round with a gold background, featuring black Arabic numerals and red clock hands. It is set within a decorative, ornate frame and lacks additional markings or embellishments.
